title: Robust Smoky Ukrainian Beet Salad
description: A sour and crunchy Ukrainian dish featuring beets, demerara sugar, and a smoky flavor, perfect for a romantic evening, and shojin-friendly for a meatless meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Wrap the beets in foil and roast for 45 minutes, or until tender.
Let the beets cool, then peel and dice them.
In a large bowl, whisk together the demerara sugar, apple cider vinegar, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the diced beets, chopped walnuts, thinly sliced red onion, and chopped fresh dill to the bowl and toss to combine.
Let the salad sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover and refrigerate the salad for at least 2 hours to allow the flavors to chill and combine.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
